name: claude-tools
description: Personal Claude Code tools for professional software engineering: a stack-agnostic loop-engineering harness for implementation work on any project, plus discovery-through-document-delivery processes (one for AI projects, one for general software projects) and AI build tooling for the AI-project subset of that work.

plugins.name: reasoning-core
plugins.description: Base reasoning layer distilled from Fable 5: seven behaviour-sliced skills (read-the-request, decompose-and-check, numbers-discipline, calibrated-uncertainty, investigate-first, report-findings, finish-check) plus a trap-based eval set proving each skill moves behaviour on Opus and Sonnet. Standalone with no dependencies; other plugins may build on it.

plugins.name: ai-project
plugins.description: Discovery and design process for AI projects specifically, not a general project process. Requirements gathering captured as working markdown, with the document package rendered at each gate by the project's chosen style pack (default generic-docx). Includes /new-ai-project, /render-gate-package, the ai-poc-docs skill, discovery and gate-renderer agents, and a design-reviewer agent. Hands off to loop-harness for implementation.

plugins.name: software-project
plugins.description: Discovery and design process for general (non-AI) software projects: the counterpart to ai-project. Requirements gathering captured as working markdown, with the document package (BRD, SRS, NFR spec, HLD/LLD, ADRs, RAID log, test plan, traceability matrix, delivery plan) rendered at each gate by the project's chosen style pack (default generic-docx), citing real industry standards (ISO/IEC/IEEE 29148 and 42010, ISO/IEC 25010, ISO/IEC/IEEE 29119, ISO/IEC 27001, OWASP ASVS, ISO 21502, PMBOK, PRINCE2). Includes /new-software-project, /render-gate-package, the software-design-docs skill, discovery and gate-renderer agents, and a design-reviewer agent. Hands off to loop-harness for implementation.

plugins.name: generic-docx
plugins.description: Neutral, unbranded .docx style pack (A4, Arial, neutral palette). The default style pack for ai-project and software-project.

plugins.name: loop-harness
plugins.description: Stack-agnostic loop-engineering harness: pwsh hooks (session context, Bash/PowerShell deny-list guard, Stop+SubagentStop gate on build/verify.ps1 with a real round-trip cap and ledger logging), maker/checker/explorer/verifier sub-agents with real effort routing, /init-harness bootstrap, /work-next automation, per-stack verify templates that fail loudly until wired, and harness-audit/claude-code-hook-facts/verify-gate-authoring skills.

plugins.name: ai-agent-pack
plugins.description: Build tooling for AI features: build-agent, build-connector, build-mcp-server and write-evals skills, plus a manifest-checker agent. Composes with loop-harness.
